# Ayush Dutta - Security Researcher & Developer

> 22-year-old security researcher and developer. GitHub Campus Expert, Keploy API Fellow, OffSec bounty hunter. Building accessible security education through MagmaCore and Cylynk. Zero-JS portfolio at berzi.one.

## About

Passionate about cybersecurity, penetration testing, and making security education accessible to everyone. GitHub Campus Expert (2% global acceptance), Keploy API Fellow (5.4% acceptance), and OffSec bounty hunter.

## Projects

- [densezk](https://github.com/spirizeon/densezk): Mobile-first zero-knowledge proof SDK achieving 17x performance boost
- [lumen](https://github.com/spirizeon/lumen): LLM-assisted malware analysis framework (150+ users)
- [dialga](https://github.com/spirizeon/dialga): Version control system in Rust
- [lemonx](https://lemonx.berzi.one): AI agents for automated bug finding and fixing
- [OSMsec](https://osmsec.xyz): Vulnerable security labs with real exploits for learning
- [LemonX](https://lemonx.berzi.one): AI-driven bug detection using GitHub Actions

## Work Experience

- [MagmaCore](https://magmacore.io): Open source mentee through Linux Foundation, building future of telecom
- [Cylynk](https://cylynk.com/): Building accessible security education in Melbourne
- [OSMsec](https://osmsec.xyz): Created vulnerable labs used by thousands

## Education

- [SRM University-AP](https://www.srmap.edu.in): B.Tech program

## Skills

Cybersecurity, Penetration Testing, Bug Bounty, Zero-Knowledge Proofs, Rust, Web Security, Malware Analysis, Security Education, LLM Applications, GitHub Actions
